M-DOCS-README.NAME: Project README
M-DOCS-README.Purpose: Document the project value, one-script VPS deployment flow, and operator-facing TLS/runtime guidance in the repository root README.

Scope.Item: Explain what KPprotoN is and what it solves
Show one-script deploy flow for a clean VPS
Document TLS issuance and reuse options
Document verification flow and operator troubleshooting entry points

Risks.Risk: README can drift from the actual install flow if not kept aligned with install.sh
Missing deploy guidance makes the project hard to adopt
